calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Boland for Stephen Ferrando. Alex Borden (via court call) for Accelerated Inheritance.

Mr. Boland reported that he has original letters from U.S. Bank, that previously the examiner had requested that they re-publish, that the expense of $105.90 was an over statement of $51.00 and has been adjusted, that they have not requested extraordinary fees, that the shop vac that was purchased was to replace the personal shop vac which blew out during the cleaning of the property and that in regards to the notary fees they think it may have been associated with communications with a collection agency but are not sure. Mr. Borden clarified that the amount of assignment is $87,200.00. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
